briefing.title: 002 Pilot Deployment Mission
briefing.text: Pilot deployment receipt map loaded through mission runtime. Deployment should still gate Begin Mission.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Choose deployment cells, then begin combat. This is still the same deployment system.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Victory. Pilot deployment survived the mission wrapper.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Defeat. Pilot deployment mission ended correctly.
